creator: nicole@unixgirl.com
text:
Tyan S2927 Motherboard works fine except no networking ports found.

 The ports are listed as being:
 Two n-Force Pro 3600 Integrated MAC with two Marvell 88E1116 single port Gigabitethernet PHY. Integrated TCP offload Engine TOE

 Ieee802.3 compiant, WOL/PXE support

How-To-Repeat: Test this board. 
 I can likely loan this board out if somoene wants to write a driver for it.
